case_title: ANTOLIN A MARENCO VS. GEORGE PIERRE BOURDET

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-14-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $0.00 SERVED OCT-30-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOURDET, GEORGE PIERRE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
